Class ReplyManager

java.lang.Object
modelClasses.ReplyManager
public class ReplyManager extends Object

Title: Reply Manager Class

Description: This Reply Manager class represents the link between ControllerReplies, Reply, and Database.

Copyright: Noah Cilliers © 2026

Author:
Noah Cillers

  • Constructor Details

    • ReplyManager

      public ReplyManager(Database database)

  • Method Details

    • refreshFromDatabase

      public void refreshFromDatabase()

      Method: refreshFromDatabase()

      Description: Public method gets all the replies from the database

    • addReply

      public boolean addReply(long parentPostId, String author, String content)

      Method: addReply(long parentPostId, String author, String content)

      Description: Public method sends the reply to database to be created

      Parameters:
      parentPostId - number to identify what post this reply is being added to
      author - userName of the person who is making the reply
      content - text content of the reply to be added
      Returns:
      ok boolean to see if the reply was added successfully

    • softDeleteReply

      public boolean softDeleteReply(long replyId)

      Method: softDeleteReply(long replyId)

      Description: Public method sends the reply to database to be modified

      Parameters:
      replyId - number used to identify the reply to be deleted
      Returns:
      ok boolean to see if the reply is deleted successfully

    • getRepliesForPost

      public List<Reply> getRepliesForPost(long postId)

      Method: getRepliesForPost(long postId)

      Description: Public method gets all the replies for a post to be displayed

      Parameters:
      postId - number to identify the post to get all the replies for
      Returns:
      replyList data structure that stores replies for a given post

    • searchReplies

      public List<Reply> searchReplies(long postID, String keyword)

      Method: searchReplies(long postID,String keyword)

      Description: Public method searches contents, author, and theard ID

      Returns:
      results data structure that stores replies for a given post that matches the given keyword
